creator: jsm@FreeBSD.org
text:
I have applied D16387 from phab to ports head @489328.
They all builds fine in poudriere
pkg info -r libfm
libfm-1.3.1:
        libfm-qt-0.13.0_2
        pcmanfm-qt-0.13.0_2
        lxqt-qtplugin-0.13.0_2
        lximage-qt-0.7.0_2
As maintainer of lximage-qt-0.7.0_2 and lxqt-qtplugin-0.13.0_2 i can approve the changes in D16387. I cannot see the same changes in the diff here though.
